# PocketCloud Drive - Optimized Raspberry Pi 4B Configuration
# Generated by optimize-pi.sh
# This file should be copied to /boot/config.txt

[all]
# Basic GPU memory allocation
gpu_mem=128

# Enable 64-bit mode
arm_64bit=1

# === PERFORMANCE OVERCLOCKING ===
# Conservative but stable overclock settings
# Tested stable under continuous load

# CPU overclock to 1900MHz (from 1500MHz default)
over_voltage=4
arm_freq=1900

# GPU overclock to 600MHz (from 500MHz default)  
gpu_freq=600

# Memory overclock
sdram_freq=3200
sdram_schmoo=0x02000020
over_voltage_sdram_p=6
over_voltage_sdram_i=4
over_voltage_sdram_c=4

# microSD card speed boost (100MHz from 50MHz)
dtparam=sd_overclock=100

# === USB 3.0 OPTIMIZATION ===
# Enable USB 3.0 host mode for maximum performance
dtoverlay=dwc2,dr_mode=host

# PCIe Gen 2 for USB 3.0 controller (500MB/s theoretical)
dtparam=pciex1_gen=2

# USB power management - disable power saving
dtparam=usb-max-current-enable=1

# === NETWORK OPTIMIZATION ===
# Ethernet performance tuning
dtparam=eth_led0=4
dtparam=eth_led1=8

# WiFi power management - disable for performance
dtparam=wifi_pwr_mgmt_off=1

# === THERMAL MANAGEMENT ===
# Enable temperature monitoring
dtparam=temp_limit=85

# Fan control (if fan connected to GPIO)
# Uncomment and adjust if you have a fan
# dtoverlay=gpio-fan,gpiopin=18,temp=65000

# === AUDIO/VIDEO ===
# Disable audio if not needed (saves power/heat)
dtparam=audio=off

# HDMI settings for headless operation
hdmi_blanking=1
hdmi_ignore_cec_init=1
hdmi_ignore_cec=1

# === BOOT OPTIMIZATION ===
# Disable rainbow splash screen
disable_splash=1

# Reduce boot delay
boot_delay=0

# Disable unused interfaces to save boot time and power
dtparam=i2c_arm=off
dtparam=spi=off

# === MEMORY OPTIMIZATION ===
# CMA (Contiguous Memory Allocator) for better memory management
cma_lwm=16
cma_hwm=32
cma_offline_start=16

# === POWER MANAGEMENT ===
# Disable power LED (saves minimal power)
dtparam=pwr_led_trigger=none
dtparam=pwr_led_activelow=off

# Disable activity LED (optional)
dtparam=act_led_trigger=none
dtparam=act_led_activelow=off

# === STABILITY SETTINGS ===
# Force turbo mode for consistent performance
force_turbo=1

# Disable dynamic frequency scaling for stability
scaling_governor=performance

# === HARDWARE SPECIFIC ===
# Enable hardware random number generator
dtparam=random=on

# Enable hardware watchdog
dtparam=watchdog=on

# === EXPERIMENTAL (OPTIONAL) ===
# Uncomment these for even more performance (less stable)
# WARNING: Only enable if you have excellent cooling

# Higher CPU voltage for extreme overclocking
# over_voltage=6
# arm_freq=2000

# Higher GPU overclock
# gpu_freq=700

# Faster memory timings (may cause instability)
# sdram_freq=3400

# === NOTES ===
# - Monitor temperature with: watch -n 1 vcgencmd measure_temp
# - Check throttling with: vcgencmd get_throttled
# - Revert to safe settings if system becomes unstable
# - Ensure adequate cooling (heatsink + fan recommended)
# - Test stability with benchmark.sh after applying changes
